overview: RAP Integrated Studio is a luxury cinematic management platform for photography, videography, and short film studio services. It features multi-role access (Admin, Client, Student, Receptionist, Staff), Stripe payments for course enrollment, a full CMS, and certificate issuance after course completion.
features: Multi-role login and registration (/login for Client/Student, /admin/login for Receptionist/Staff/Admin)
Admin super dashboard with live data, pending approvals, direct user add/remove, full CMS
Stripe payment gateway for course enrollment and studio bookings
Online course learning flow: YouTube lessons, 10+ question quizzes, certificate after completion + payment
Certificate with QR code verifiable at /verify/{code}
Premium dark/light theme with deep navy, rich gold, midnight blue, champagne palette
Glassmorphism cards, smooth animations, circular orbital service layout
Gallery with masonry grid, lightbox, category filters
Student, Staff, Receptionist, and Client role-based dashboards with live 5-second polling
All data stored in backend canister state — no mock data
